title: Unique Umami Korean Beetroot Jjigae
description: A briny, fluffy, and nostalgic Korean dish featuring cooked beetroot, ssam-wrap, and wrapped in pandan leaves, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Wrap the beetroot in foil and roast for 45 minutes, or until tender.
In a blender or food processor, combine gochujang, doenjang, garlic, and ginger, and blend until smooth.
In a large pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and add the blended paste, cooking for 2 minutes.
Add the roasted beetroot, tofu, salt, and black pepper to the pan, stirring to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Prepare the pandan leaves by cutting out the stem and washing the leaves.
Place a portion of the beetroot mixture onto a pandan leaf and fold the leaf to form a package, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Serve the Unique Umami Korean Beetroot Jjigae hot, with additional pandan leaves on the side for wrapping.
Allow each guest to assemble their own ssam-wrap with the beetroot mixture and garnishes of their choice.
